geography.data_source: BBMP ward boundaries 2023 for East zone; covers Indiranagar, Domlur, HAL Layout, Marathahalli, Brookefield

demographics.data_source: Census 2011 ward-level data extrapolated with BBMP 2023; smaller household size reflects young professional and DINK demographics; highest literacy zone in Bengaluru

income_profile.data_source: NSSO 78th Round PLFS adjusted for high-income urban ward mix; Indiranagar rental indices from MagicBricks/99acres 2023 as income proxy; informal rate reflects mix of formal offices and F&B/retail informal sector

commute_profile.data_source: BMRCL Purple Line ridership data 2024 — Indiranagar among top-5 busiest stations; shorter commute due to mixed-use zoning; high car ownership from RTO data 2023 for east zone wards

sensitivity_parameters.data_source: Low fare sensitivity due to high incomes; high diffusion speed — digitally connected affluent demographic; moderate political mobilisation — urban professional civic activism (e.g. steel flyover protests); from Lokniti-CSDS 2024 and NSSO consumption data

social_network_parameters.data_source: High cross-income bridging from mixed commercial-residential character; Indiranagar 100 Feet Road creates organic social mixing; tier2 density elevated due to F&B entrepreneur density; from IHDS-II urban social network patterns

informal_economy_nodes.data_source: Indiranagar 100 Feet Road commercial strip — Bangalore's premium F&B and retail corridor; footfall from BBMP data 2023 and BMRCL Indiranagar station exit counts
Domlur market area; BBMP street vendor survey 2022; serves office worker lunch crowd from EGL/Prestige Tech Park
Marathahalli bridge commercial cluster; BBMP trade license data 2023; high transit dependency due to ORR junction bus stops

data_source: Composite zone config from Census 2011, NSSO PLFS 78th Round, BMRCL 2024, DULT CMP 2020, BBMP 2023, MagicBricks rental data 2023, RTO Bangalore Urban 2023
